open.label: Open Group
open.description: People can join whenever. Community open groups also get a permanent slug invite.

invite_only.label: Invite Only
invite_only.description: People can only join through generated invite links.

application.label: Application Based
application.description: People apply for review. Generated invite links can still add members directly.

states.no_description_short: This group has not added a description yet.
states.no_description_long: This group has not added a description yet. Use this space to clarify what you run, who it is for, and how people should approach joining.

validation.active_time_pair_required: 活動開始時刻と終了時刻は両方とも指定してください。
validation.active_timezone_required: 活動日または活動時間を設定する場合は、活動タイムゾーンが必要です。
validation.active_end_time_after_start: 活動終了時刻は開始時刻より後である必要があります。
validation.invalid_join_mode_for_group_type: Choose a join mode supported by this group type.
